aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and contact information, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and ratings to build trust and improve local search presence.
Enhance content with location-specific keywords and detailed service descriptions.
Implement FAQ schema to address common customer queries and improve search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information and has a basic schema implementation.
gbp_analysis.summary: While the NAP is consistent, the lack of Google Business Profile (GBP) and online reviews significantly impacts local search performance.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) found.
Zero customer reviews or ratings on Google.

nap_citations.summary: The NAP information is consistent across the website but lacks citations on other authoritative platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile (GBP) with accurate NAP information.
List the business on local directories and citation sites like Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and GBP listing
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers seeking trusted HVAC services
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema and adding customer testimonials
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Engaging with local communities and industry forums to build brand authority and earn backlinks
